SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-29-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-29-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF LEE MILLER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS FRANK LARA AND UNITED EDUCATOR'S OF SAN FRANCISCO (REPRESENTED BY CASSONDRA CURIEL) ARE PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MILLER, LEE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LARA, FRANK UNITED EDUCATORS OF SAN FRANCISCO $7,702.62 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,732.62, DEFENDANT MISREPRESENTED UNION'S ROLE AND DID NOT REVEAL ITS SUPPORT FOR THE PALESTINIAN CAUSE AND CLAIMS OF ISRAELI "GENOCIDE". THIS AWARD IS THE RETURN OF PLAINTIFF'S $2,702.62 IN FEES AND $5,000 FOR THE SEVERE EMOTIONAL STRESS PLAINTIFF SUFFERED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT MILLER, LEE TAKE NOTHING FROM APPELLANT LARA, FRANK UNITED EDUCATORS OF SAN FRANCISCO RESPONDENT IS NOT ENTITLED TO REIMBURSEMENT OF HIS UNION DUES AS RESPONDENT WAS NEVER DENIED BENEFITS PROVIDED BY HIS UNION MEMBERSHIP DURING THAT TIME PERIOD.
